title: Unique Party 71749 - Disney Doc McStuffins Scene Setter Wall Decoration, 5ft x 2.5ft
features: 1 Disney Doc McStuffins Scene Setter Poster
Doc McStuffins Scene Setter measures approximately 150cm x 77cm (5ft x 2.5ft)
Plastic poster wall decoration features images of Doc McStuffins, Stuffy, Lambie, Chilly, and Hallie being cared for in the clinic
Scene setters are great party decorations that double as a lovely backdrop for taking pictures at your Doc McStuffins party
Coordinate with other Disney Doc McStuffins party decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Transform your party room into Doc McStuffins' clinic with this delightful Disney Doc McStuffins Scene Setter! This large wall poster acts as a great party decoration for your cuddly toy caregiver's celebration. It also provides a lovely backdrop for taking photos with friends. Your own little doctor-in-training can join Stuffy, Hallie, Lambie, and Chilly as they pose with them in the clinic setting for a super memento of a Doc McStuffins birthday party. For more kids party ideas, coordinate this wall poster with other Doc McStuffins party supplies and party decorations for a celebration that is sure to impress. This Doc McStuffins Wall Poster measures approximately 150cm x 77cm (5ft x 2.5ft). Box Contains 1 x Scene Setter
